title: Internal Reallocation — Delivery Phase Velocity Drop
description: Reassign one senior consultant from another project in stabilisation phase. Run a 3-day sprint reset. Do not involve client until velocity recovers for 2 consecutive weeks.

title: Client Escalation — Scope Renegotiation
description: Schedule executive alignment call within 5 days. Prepare a scope options document with cost/timeline tradeoffs. Present 3 paths: descope, extend timeline, or add budget.

title: Timeline Extension — Milestone Pressure Relief
description: Negotiate a 2-3 week milestone extension with client. Replan sprint cadence. Use freed pressure to stabilise team and recover velocity before resuming original pace.

title: Executive Intervention — Relationship Recovery
description: Partner or MD calls client CXO directly. Acknowledge the concern before presenting solutions. Assign a dedicated client success contact for weekly check-ins.
